race.description: Vrc Member Richard John Rowlands Plate (Bm100) Hcp
race.comment: Competitive race. SAINT GEORGE (2) looks a solid each-way price off a nice return here over 1620m, getting home nicely for fourth to Seafall. Up to 2000m suits perfectly and although only second up he's run well early in campaigns before. THINK GIANT (12) is the tricky one, second up in Australia. His debut here was good at Caulfield when getting back and making steady ground nearer the inside. That perhaps flattered him a touch as others had to loop the field but he drops 8kg and gets Williams on with improvement to come. BANKERS CHOICE (1) was beaten by NELLIE LEYLAX (7) last time at Caulfield. BANKERS CHOICE had to work early to find the front and stuck on bravely while NELLIE LEYLAX got the perfect drop. Fancy BANKERS CHOICE can turn the tables at bigger prices. SMOKIN' ROMANS (3) was third there and kept trying, he'll roll forward and should take some beating again.
